reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology asks the prescribing practitioner to weigh Hunter Williams's newer, dated statement: "You can get all the results you need at like 250 to 750 micrograms of slu" (Hunter Williams, 2026-06-17, slug saturday-morning-coffee-talk-6626--4fc8b831, 1:34:54, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/saturday-morning-coffee-talk-6626--4fc8b831/). The older Hunter statement remains in the record: "I think that dosing sweet spot is going to be somewhere between a thousand and 2000 micrograms per day" (Hunter Williams, updated as of November 2024, slug slu-pp-332-dosage-update-my-3-month-transformation-insights--95390ece, 12:01, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/slu-pp-332-dosage-update-my-3-month-transformation-insights--95390ece/).
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- "Please do not do that right away. If you've never used SL you, don't ever take more than 500 to 750 micrograms of SL." (Hunter Williams, 2026-06-17, slug saturday-morning-coffee-talk-6626--4fc8b831, 1:34:23, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/saturday-morning-coffee-talk-6626--4fc8b831/)
- "And so it's not only kidney, it is just this whole host of oxidative stress that is now hammering the body." (Hunter Williams, 2026-06-17, slug saturday-morning-coffee-talk-6626--4fc8b831, 1:55:10, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/saturday-morning-coffee-talk-6626--4fc8b831/)
- "I have seen people's GFR drop from 90 to 60 after doing prolonged periods of high dose SLU." (Hunter Williams, 2026-06-17, slug saturday-morning-coffee-talk-6626--4fc8b831, 1:55:41, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/saturday-morning-coffee-talk-6626--4fc8b831/)
- "This is obviously a small sample size we can't say you know sleep is the greatest thing ever" (Hunter Williams, 2026-03-29, slug new-study-on-slu-pp-332-just-released--d6b45df8, 16:20, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/new-study-on-slu-pp-332-just-released--d6b45df8/).
- "SLU can actually amplify bad mitochondria. So, if your mitochondria in a bad state...you go back to using SS31 before any of these to heal and improve mitochondrial function." (Taylor Williams, 2026-02-08, JccJTHbWF84, 00:54:18.000, https://youtu.be/JccJTHbWF84)

I would say 750 micrograms to 1 milligram and then kind of sit there." (2026-02-08, JccJTHbWF84, 00:53:35.119, https://youtu.be/JccJTHbWF84)
